description: Complete rewrite of GagansModel_EA.mq5 as a full indicator+EA hybrid that draws everything on chart (T-Spot zones, FVGs, PFVGs, Volume Imbalances, CISD lines, projections, sweep confirmations, Silver T-Spot) AND executes trades using the T-Spot Sweep Confirmation entry system with full position management.
steps: Create the complete GagansModel_EA.mq5 file at /projects/sandbox/Claude/GagansModel_EA.mq5 (overwrite existing). The file must be approximately 2500-3500 lines of MQL5 code.
HEADER SECTION (~lines 1-50): #property directives, #include <Trade\Trade.mqh> and <Trade\PositionInfo.mqh>, CTrade and CPositionInfo instances.

INPUT PARAMETERS SECTION (~lines 50-150): All inputs matching the Pine Script indicator settings exactly as specified in the user instruction. Group them into: HTF & Display, T-Spot Settings, FVG Settings, PFVG Settings, Volume Imbalance, CISD Settings, Projection Settings, Chart Drawing Settings, Silver T-Spot, Entry & Risk Management, Position Management, System/Magic.

ENUMERATIONS AND STRUCTURES (~lines 150-250): Define structures for TSpotData (direction, midline, close_level, high, low, time_start, time_end, is_active, is_hidden, pattern_name), FVGData (high, low, time_start, time_end, is_bullish), CISDData (price, time, direction), SweepConfirmData (pivot_price, pivot_time, touched, confirmed, direction).

GLOBAL VARIABLES (~lines 250-350): Arrays to hold up to Max_Display T-Spots, FVGs, PFVGs, Volume Imbalances, CISD lines. State machine variables. HTF tracking variables. Dashboard label prefix 'GM_' for unique object names.
OnInit FUNCTION (~lines 350-400): Initialize pip/point_size, trade object settings, ArraySetAsSeries calls, call SyncStateFromMarket, call CreateDashboard, initial chart drawing setup.
OnDeinit FUNCTION (~lines 400-420): ObjectsDeleteAll(0, prefix) to clean all drawn objects, release any indicator handles.

OnTick FUNCTION (~lines 420-470): Main loop - check for new HTF candle, if new HTF: run T-Spot detection and draw HTF start line. Every tick: update sweep confirmation state machine, check invalidation, manage positions, extend latest T-Spot/projections to current bar, update dashboard.

HTF START LINE DRAWING (~lines 470-500): Draw vertical dotted line (OBJ_VLINE) at each HTF candle boundary, black color, width 1, STYLE_DOT. Maintain up to Max_Display * 15 lines (covering recent HTF candles).

T-SPOT DETECTION ENGINE (~lines 500-700): Implement all 6 patterns exactly as in existing code (Normal Bearish/Bullish, Expansive Bearish/Bullish, Pro-Trend Mid Sweep). Include swept-both invalidation filter. Calculate LogMidpoint for midline. Store detected T-Spot in array with all metadata. IMPORTANT: Do NOT place trade immediately - only draw the zone and start monitoring for sweep confirmation.

T-SPOT ZONE DRAWING (~lines 700-800): For each active T-Spot: draw OBJ_RECTANGLE from midline to close_level (colored green/90% transparency for bull, red/90% transparency for bear), draw solid midline (OBJ_TREND horizontal), draw solid close line (OBJ_TREND horizontal). Extend latest T-Spot to current bar. Implement 'Hide T-Spots When Trading Against' - make transparent when price closes beyond midline.

SWEEP CONFIRMATION SYSTEM (~lines 800-1000): This is the critical entry logic. For each active T-Spot: (1) Wait for price to TOUCH close_level (bearish: high > close_level OR open > close_level, AND close < close_level; bullish: low < close_level OR open < close_level, AND close > close_level). (2) Track pivot formation using body (max(open,close) for pivot high, min(open,close) for pivot low) with lookback 2. (3) Wait for SWEEP of pivot (bullish: pivot_high forms before touch, price closes above pivot_high, open < pivot_high, pivot_high > tspot_close_level; bearish: pivot_low forms before touch, price closes below pivot_low, open > pivot_low, pivot_low < tspot_close_level). (4) Draw confirmation line at pivot level. (5) Draw C2/C3/C4 labels. (6) Draw sweep confirmation label (triangle + 'T-Spot\nSweep'). (7) ONLY THEN place the trade.

FVG DETECTION AND DRAWING (~lines 1000-1100): Scan M1 bars for Fair Value Gaps (bullish: bar[i].low > bar[i+2].high; bearish: bar[i].high < bar[i+2].low). Draw gray transparent OBJ_RECTANGLE for each FVG. Maintain array, limit display.

PFVG DETECTION AND DRAWING (~lines 1100-1200): First Presented FVG within each HTF candle. Blue colored OBJ_RECTANGLE. Only show first FVG that forms within each HTF period. Max_PFVG_Display limit. 'Only with T-Spot' filter option.
VOLUME IMBALANCE DETECTION AND DRAWING (~lines 1200-1300): Detect volume imbalances (gap between consecutive candle bodies). Draw orange OBJ_RECTANGLE for each.

CISD DETECTION AND DRAWING (~lines 1300-1450): Change In State of Delivery. Track consecutive same-polarity candles (series), find the extreme, detect when price breaks through. Draw yellow horizontal line (width 2) at the break level. Show All CISD Lines option. Calculate series range for projections.

PROJECTION LINES DRAWING (~lines 1450-1550): From CISD break price, draw dotted horizontal lines at 0.5, 1.0, 1.5, 2.0, 2.5 multiples of series_range. Tiny OBJ_TEXT labels showing level number. Extend latest projections to current bar.

SILVER T-SPOT DETECTION (~lines 1550-1650): Check if current 4H candle block is 4 (hour >= 13 NYC) or 5. For bullish: close > prev_prev.high AND close > prev_closed.high. For bearish: close < prev_prev.low AND close < prev_closed.low. Draw 'Silver T-Spot' or 'Silver Expansive T-Spot' OBJ_TEXT label.
CHART SWEEP LINES (~lines 1650-1700): Draw horizontal lines showing where price swept a previous level. These are the swept highs/lows that form the T-Spot pattern.

TRADE EXECUTION (~lines 1700-1800): After sweep confirmation, place market order (not limit - since confirmation already happened at the level). Entry at current price (market), SL at nearest FVG + buffer, TP at projection level 2.0. Use CalculateLotSize based on risk percent.

POSITION MANAGEMENT STATE MACHINE (~lines 1800-2000): States: NONE, MONITORING (watching for sweep confirmation), OPEN (full position), PARTIAL (70% closed at proj 2.0, SL moved to BE+3 pips), TRAILING (10 pip trailing after proj 2.5). Invalidation: close beyond midline closes/cancels.
HTF BIAS CALCULATION (~lines 2000-2100): GetHTFBias method matching Pine Script logic - use last 2 closed HTF candles, check sweep/close patterns to determine Bullish/Bearish/Neutral bias.

INFO TABLE / DASHBOARD (~lines 2100-2300): Show model name ('1M-15M Model'), remaining time until HTF candle close (countdown timer), HTF Bias (from GetHTFBias), current state, T-Spot info, entry/SL/TP prices, P&L. Use ObjLbl/ObjRect/ObjSet/ObjLine helpers matching GaganEA_v3.mq5 pattern.

HELPER FUNCTIONS (~lines 2300-2500): LogMidpoint, MidLevel, IsSweptBoth, NormLot, CalculateLotSize, TFStr, ObjLbl, ObjSet, ObjLine, ObjRect, FindOurPosition, ResetState, SyncStateFromMarket, color helpers for transparency.

OBJECT NAMING: All chart objects must use 'GM_' prefix for clean removal. Use descriptive suffixes like 'GM_tspot_0_box', 'GM_tspot_0_mid', 'GM_fvg_5', 'GM_cisd_3', 'GM_proj_2_1.5', 'GM_htf_vline_3', etc.
Ensure the file compiles cleanly in MQL5 - no undeclared variables, all functions defined before use or declared, proper type casting, proper array handling.
acceptance_criteria: File exists at /projects/sandbox/Claude/GagansModel_EA.mq5 and is between 2500-3500 lines
Contains all 15 chart drawing elements listed in user instruction
Implements full T-Spot Sweep Confirmation entry system (touch -> pivot -> sweep -> trade)
Does NOT enter immediately on T-Spot detection - only after full confirmation flow
Implements position management: 70% partial at proj 2.0, BE+3 after partial, 10 pip trail at proj 2.5
Draws FVG boxes (gray), PFVG boxes (blue), Volume Imbalance boxes (orange), CISD lines (yellow, width 2)
Draws T-Spot zone rectangles with 90% transparency, midline, close line
Draws projection lines at 0.5, 1.0, 1.5, 2.0, 2.5 levels with tiny labels
Implements Silver T-Spot detection based on 4H candle blocks
Implements HTF Bias calculation and displays in info table
Shows countdown timer to next HTF candle close
Uses 'GM_' prefix for all objects, cleans up on deinit
Uses CTrade and CPositionInfo from standard includes
Follows code style of GaganEA_v3.mq5 (ObjLbl/ObjRect helpers, input groups, state machine)
verification: Run: grep -c 'OBJ_RECTANGLE\|OBJ_TREND\|OBJ_VLINE\|OBJ_TEXT\|OBJ_LABEL' /projects/sandbox/Claude/GagansModel_EA.mq5 - should be > 30 (many chart drawing calls)
Run: grep -c 'T-Spot.*Sweep\|sweep.*confirm\|pivot' /projects/sandbox/Claude/GagansModel_EA.mq5 - should be > 10 (sweep confirmation logic)
Run: grep 'OnInit\|OnDeinit\|OnTick' /projects/sandbox/Claude/GagansModel_EA.mq5 - should show all three entry points
Run: grep 'Silver.*T-Spot\|CISD\|PFVG\|Volume.*Imbalance\|HTF.*Bias' /projects/sandbox/Claude/GagansModel_EA.mq5 - all should be present
Run: grep 'GM_' /projects/sandbox/Claude/GagansModel_EA.mq5 | head -5 - should show GM_ prefix usage
findings: File is 3226 lines. All 15 chart drawing elements implemented. Sweep confirmation system with touch->pivot->sweep flow verified. No limit orders - only market orders after confirmation. Position management with 70% partial, BE+3, and 10 pip trail all in place. All verification grep checks pass: 34 OBJ_ references, 141 sweep/pivot references, 86 feature keyword references. Cannot compile-verify as MQL5 requires MetaEditor IDE not available in sandbox.
